stories.title: NBA free agent rankings: Bobby Marks' offers for L...
stories.summary: Who's getting paid this summer -- and how much? Bobby Marks examines the free agency future of 20 players, starting with the NBA's leading career scorer.

stories.title: NASCAR icon Kyle Busch dies at the age of 41
stories.summary: Kyle Busch, a two-time Cup Series champion who won more races across the sport's three series than any other driver in history, died at the age of 41.

stories.title: Source: Giants DL Robertson-Harris tears Achilles
stories.summary: Giants defensive lineman Roy Robertson-Harris tore his Achilles at Thursday's OTA workout and is expected to miss the 2026 season, a source told ESPN.

stories.title: U.S.: Congo must isolate to enter for World Cup
stories.summary: The Congo team must isolate for 21 days or risk the ability to enter the U.S. for the World Cup as the country deals with an outbreak of Ebola, Andrew Giuliani told ESPN on Friday.

stories.title: Sources: Stafford gets 1-year, $55M extension
stories.summary: Reigning NFL MVP Matthew Stafford and the Rams reached agreement on a one-year, $55 million extension, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter. The QB is now tied to L.A. through the 2027 season, with $105 million remaining on his deal.
